ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Standard name of the climate variable (e.g., precipitation_flux_onto_canopy) */,
  "output_variable_name" TEXT /* Output variable name (e.g., prveg) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the climate variable (e.g., kg m-2 s-1) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the climate variable */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the climate variable */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_format table */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_type table */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the dataset table */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the collection_method table */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_format" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., NetCDF, HDF5) */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_type" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., precipitation, temperature) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user table */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_method" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method (e.g., satellite, ground-based) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data point
